title: Diagnose a simulation vs synthesis mismatch
description: When gate-level behavior differs from RTL, isolate the cause among sensitivity lists, sim-only constructs, and X-propagation.
body: Steps: 1. Reproduce both RTL and gate-level simulation on the same stimulus. 2. Compare the first divergent signal and cycle. 3. Check common causes: incomplete sensitivity list (use always_comb), initial/delay constructs ignored by synthesis, and X-pessimism/optimism at reset. 4. Fix the RTL construct, not the gate model. 5. Re-run gate-level and/or formal equivalence. Rollback point: before editing constraints. Validation: gate-level matches RTL and formal equivalence passes; never patch the gate netlist to match a buggy RTL.
